notes: Full Basque tapas menu captured (cold plates, cheeses, hot vegetable/egg, fish & seafood, meat). Share-plate venue -> all items course_type 'plate', a meal built from a shared spread. Gilda is priced per skewer; cheeses are priced per ounce ($6.75/oz) or as a four-cheese selection for $26. No dietary marks on the menu; '*' on Ibérico is an undercooked-meat notice. Wine/sherry list lives on a separate /drink page and was not captured here; beverages left empty.
